name: library-management
description: Dev orchestration for the library-management monorepo (backend API + frontend SPA + Postgres). See README.md.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:up && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
